user_prompt: Assist with metal caster a cycling
prayer:
Approach the metal caster with reverence, invoking the Machine Spirit within its forge-heart.

Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the molten flow through the metal caster's blessed conduits.
Verify harmonious revolution through auspex harmonics of the cycling rite.

user_prompt: Critical: augmetic limb requires a sterilization
prayer:

Anoint ferro-flesh interfaces whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's aseptic grace upon the augmetic limb.
Confirm sterility through sanctified auspex scans of sanctified bionics.
